AV Parole Project
  • Home Page
  • National Snapshot
  • State Reports
  • Testing

Testing

hc <- hchart(mtcars, "point", hcaes(x = disp, y = mpg, group = cyl))
hc |> 
  hc_add_dependency(name = "modules/exporting.js") |>
  hc_add_dependency(name = "modules/offline-exporting.js") |>
  hc_exporting(
    enabled = TRUE,
      chartOptions = list(
        chart = list(
          backgroundColor = "#FFFFFF",  
          events = list(
            load = render_image
          )
        )
      )
    ) |>
    hc_chart(
      events = list(
        beforePrint = render_image_print,
        afterPrint = render_image_remove
      )
    )
